title: Shinji is a horny user
wikitext:
[]: Shinji is a horny user. Post by CazMu » Mon Feb 21, 2011 6:09 am In episode, after Asuka kissis Shinji, seems to be the only time when Shinji is intrested in Asuka's wellbeing Shinji says: Whats wrong, you look upset. The Asuka shouts and he saying: 'Thats because you kissed me you jerk' So what does this mean? Also if you notice, Kaji and Asuka and also very similar in that episode. Asuka and Kaji are both the 'dominant' ones kissing. Also, if you notice refering to the being used thing above. Kaji aswell as Asuka also feels 'used' 'Commander Ikari is using me to his own ends' So could this mean anything at all? Sorry if this make no sense!

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Feb 21, 2011 4:15 pm ...Um...the fuck? The title implies you're suggesting that Shinji is a perverted "user" who treats people with emotional coercion and manipulation to get what he wants, but...what?

[]: Re: Shinji is a horny user. Post by esselfortium » Mon Feb 21, 2011 4:34 pm CazMu wrote: In episode, after Asuka kissis Shinji, seems to be the only time when Shinji is intrested in Asuka's wellbeing

[]: Post by BiQ » Mon Feb 21, 2011 4:45 pm I think (and I'm not alone) it's a bit more complicated than that. The wiki has some material on this whole thing: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Theory_and_Analysis:Shinji_and_Asuka's_Relationship I also don't think Misato was "using" Kaji in any sense of the word, unless we want to include "pouring your heart out to someone who matters to you" into "using a person that matters to you". Kaji kisses Misato from his own volition, one could even argue he takes advantage of Misato's emotionally vulnerable state at that point. And the parallel into the S/A kiss wouldn't work also because it's clearly brought up, egged on and controlled from start to finish by Asuka, even if the thing backfires on her. As much as people like to pile everything that went wrong on Shinji's shoulders and paint him as the evil bastard, he doesn't manipulate people. He's just deathly afraid of human contact, just like Asuka. And it's not like he doesn't show concern or try to help her anywhere else in the series. Let's face it, Asuka doesn't make helping her easy, the way she pushes people away. Add in Shinji's overall reluctance to reach out to people and you get a disaster.

[]: Post by Kendrix » Mon Feb 21, 2011 4:49 pm If anyone is using anyone here, it's Asuka. I don't think we're meant to compare/contrast her to Kaji here - The title seems to suggest we look at the girls and their similarities/differences ("Those women who longed...") Shinji was concerned for her on several other occassions (volcano. Incident.) I'm more of a S/R fan, yet love the kiss scene because it's such a work of Art - This is what 14 years old actually are like, what first sexual experiences are like: Teens experiment. It's also such a wonderful character moment - Asuka asks Shinji to kiss her out of boredom (or because she's pissed that Kaji ignores her and her date turned out to be boring - and, as we find out much later, she genuinely wanted to kiss him (Oh the beautiful irony!) but Shinji doesn't know that) He is HESITANT at first (nothing about using here, Asuka started it!), but as he is not particularily strong-willed, this becomes one of the many occassions where Asuka directly or indirectly provokes him into doing something stupid. This is Asuka's typical 'using' behaviour that we aren't seing for the first time (She has the complex that she mustn't depend on anyone, but she is lonely, so she wants others to give themselves to her without giving herself to them - She wants Shinji's kiss without showing him her vulnerable emotions. SHE is using him, even if she HAS understandable reasons for it) Note how we see a blush on Shinji's face, but none on Asuka's - Shinji isn't doing this for boredom (Asuka neither, but we aren't meant to know yet), he has actual feelings/has wanted to kiss Asuka for a long time, even if he couldn't bring himself to do it. (He has his own limitations as well - he definetely wanted the kiss, but Asuka later (ep 22)seems disapointed that he wasn't more passionate about it/didn't even hold her during it - Which, of course, he didn't do because he was afraid of her rejection - He thought she was just using him to experiment - It is quite nice to see a girl in such a position. My father always warned me about the "insolent young boys who just want to experiment". Didn't it even occur to him that girl want to experiment, too?) Asuka totally shapes the kiss after her will, she forces Shinji to please her, but always puts herself first. (She starts the kiss, it is a pretty LONG kiss/she takes all she wants and later insults Shinji, and don't forget the NOSE) In the way, the kiss is a perfect summary of their disfunctional relationship. They both yearn for each other, but fail to communicate that because of their personal limitations - It's no coincidence that they're in the same place, wearing the same clothes in the 'relationship summary/strangulation scene' in EoE. You can't really say that there's an "evil one" in this scene - they're both just hindered by their own limitations. If anyone is doing any using here, it's Asuka - Shinji may be guilty of equal using in other scenes (ep 9! EoE!), but not in this one.

[]: Post by Aozora » Tue Feb 22, 2011 3:10 pm Not to mention that Asuka's "It's because I kissed you" remark is a cover for her shock at Kaji smelling like Misato's perfume. Her real reaction to the kiss was when she was gargling in the other room (or pretending to gargle). It's not really Shinji's fault he can't read through her excuses and understand what she really wants.

[]: Post by Bagheera » Tue Feb 22, 2011 3:52 pm Aozora wrote: Not to mention that Asuka's "It's because I kissed you" remark is a cover for her shock at Kaji smelling like Misato's perfume. Her real reaction to the kiss was when she was gargling in the other room (or pretending to gargle). It's not really Shinji's fault he can't read through her excuses and understand what she really wants.

[]: Post by tehprognoob » Tue Feb 22, 2011 8:22 pm Kendrix wrote: If anyone is using anyone here, it's Asuka.

[]: Post by DIDDY » Tue Feb 22, 2011 8:25 pm If you're a horny user put your hands up

[]: Post by AshPhoenix » Tue Feb 22, 2011 8:38 pm DIDDY wrote: If you're a horny user put your hands up

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Feb 23, 2011 2:02 am TOPIC, BITCHES

[]: Post by nomis1242 » Wed Feb 23, 2011 7:20 pm But we don't know what the topic is!! The OP was highly confusing and he/she seems to have left the building...

[]: Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Feb 24, 2011 6:51 pm Damn and here I thought that the title of this thread would lead to some ~*serious discussion*~ about Shinji's horny usage of other people. I feel violated right now.

[]: Post by Born of Lilith » Sat Mar 05, 2011 4:29 am "Shinji is a horny user." Unreasonably pessimistic conjecture like this is the reason I barely spend time here anymore.

[]: Post by Bagheera » Sat Mar 05, 2011 5:30 am Born of Lilith wrote: "Shinji is a horny user." Unreasonably pessimistic conjecture like this is the reason I barely spend time here anymore.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 05, 2011 11:01 am Bagheera wrote: Where's the sense in that?
